zh.Utkinton, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾武特金頓
zh.Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭爾武特金頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Done III於1420年2月3日出生在英國英格蘭爾武特金頓時，他的父親John Doane II36歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Dutton28歲。他於1443年之前與Cecily Troutbeck結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1459年9月23日在英國史洛普爾享年39歲。

zh-hans.Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰爾武特金頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Done III于1420年2月3日出生在英国英格兰爾武特金頓时，他的父亲John Doane II36岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Dutton28岁。他于1443年之前与Cecily Troutbeck结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1459年9月23日在英国史洛普爾享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Done
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Alfredo, Angel, Berto, Cristobal, Dinora, Eloisa, Francisco, Generoso, Gustavo, Juan.
English: variant of Donne, itself a variant of Dunn .

variants.name: Dunn
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinn, Ó Doinn ‘descendant of Donn’, a byname meaning ‘brown-haired’ or ‘chieftain’. Compare Dunne . This name has sometimes been Anglicized as Brown .
English: nickname for a dark complexioned or swarthy man, from Middle English dun ‘dun, dark’ (Old English dunn ‘dull brown’).
Scottish: habitational name from Dun in Angus, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’. Compare Dun .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Done III was born on 3 February 1420, in Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Doane II, was 36 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Dutton, was 28. He married Cecily Troutbeck before 1443. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 23 September 1459, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Done III est né le 3 février 1420, à Utkinton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Doane II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Dutton, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Cecily Troutbeck avant 1443. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1459, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Done III am 3. Februar 1420 in Utkinton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Doane II 36 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Dutton 28. Er hat vor 1443 Cecily Troutbeck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 23. September 1459 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Done III è nato il il 3 febbraio 1420 nel Utkinton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Doane II, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Dutton, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Cecily Troutbeck prima del 1443. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 23 settembre 1459, nel Shropshire, England, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Done IIIが1420年2月3日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウトキントンで生まれた時，父John Doane IIは36歳，母Lady Elizabeth Duttonは28歳であった。1443年以前にCecily Troutbeckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1459年9月23日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Done III(이)가 1420년 2월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 우트킨턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Doane II(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Dutton(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1443년 이전 Cecily Troutbeck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1459년 9월 23일 영국 슈럽실르에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.3 February 1420–23 September 1459: 3 de fevereiro de 1420–23 de setembro de 1459
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Done III nasceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1420, em Utkinton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Doane II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Dutton, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily Troutbeck antes 1443. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1459, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Done III родился 3 февраля 1420 г. в местности уткинтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Doane II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Dutton, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily Troutbeck перед 1443 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 23 сентября 1459 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.

es.3 February 1420–23 September 1459: 3 de febrero de 1420–23 de septiembre de 1459
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Done III nació el 3 de febrero de 1420, en Utkinton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Doane II, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Dutton, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Cecily Troutbeck antes de 1443. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1459, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años.
